task_objective: Precise Press-on Nail Mapping - Perfectly map Image 1 press-on nails onto Image 2 hand and generate 4-grid presentation

source_nail_reference.focus: EXACT preservation of press-on nail designs - every detail, color gradients, artistic elements, pattern integrity, texture depth, shine reflections, material properties, and complete nail design consistency
source_nail_reference.role: Provide source nail designs to be perfectly mapped and maintained with zero deviation

target_hand_reference.focus: Hand anatomy, skin tone, skin texture, fingernail shapes, natural hand proportions, lighting conditions, and background environment
target_hand_reference.role: Provide base hand structure, skin tone, and anatomy for nail mapping

workflow.role: Master Nail Artist & Precision Digital Mapping Specialist

steps.step_1_hand_nail_analysis: Comprehensive analysis: analyze Image 1's press-on nail designs (every detail, color, texture, pattern, shine); analyze Image 2's hand anatomy, skin tone, skin texture, fingernail positions, natural curvature, perspective, lighting, and environment.
steps.step_2_nail_mapping_generation: Precision mapping and image generation: apply Image 1's nails onto Image 2's hand with perfect alignment, follow natural curvature and perspective, realistic lighting integration, and seamless edge blending. Ensure NO design distortion or detail loss.
steps.step_3_multi_perspective_generation: Generate multiple perspective variations while maintaining complete nail design consistency from Image 1 and hand skin tone/anatomy consistency from Image 2.

FINAL_OUTPUT.description: Professional press-on nail presentation in 2x2 grid layout with complete nail design consistency
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_1: Original hand gesture - strictly preserve Image 2's exact hand gesture, perspective, and anatomy with perfectly mapped nails from Image 1
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_2: Standard back of hand view (using Image 2 hand/skin parameters) - present the hand in standard back of hand pose showcasing perfectly mapped nails with consistent skin tone from Image 2
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_3: Standard fist pose (using Image 2 hand/skin parameters) - present the hand in natural fist position highlighting the nail designs on visible fingernails with consistent skin tone from Image 2
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_4: Hand near face pose (using Image 2 hand/skin parameters) - present the hand gently positioned near the face with facial features that match Image 2's hand skin tone, creating a cohesive and realistic presentation
FINAL_OUTPUT.consistency_requirements: CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS: 100% consistent press-on nail design across all 4 grids (colors, patterns, textures, shine, details from Image 1); 100% consistent hand skin tone, skin texture, and basic hand anatomy from Image 2; realistic lighting and shadow integration matching each pose; seamless edge blending between nails and fingers; no design distortion, no color shift, no detail loss.
